message:
feat(net): complete unix module with mod.rs and exports

Add the missing module file and public exports to complete the unix
domain socket support. The listener.rs and stream.rs were added in
a previous commit but lacked the module wiring.

- Create src/net/unix/mod.rs with module documentation
- Export UnixListener, UnixStream, and Incoming from net module
- All 19 unix-related tests passing

Closes asupersync-w39l

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
